summary_en: Authorised buyback of up to 3,000,000 shares (6.5% of S/O) for ¥3.0bn, running 2026-05-15 through 2026-07-31. Combined with the ¥50 dividend, FY26 total payout reaches roughly 71% of guided net income.
summary_jp: 自己株式300万株（発行済の6.5%）上限30億円を2026年5月15日から7月31日まで取得決議。

summary_en: Annual DPS raised to ¥50 from ¥40 (+25%), lifting payout to approximately 31% of FY26 guided net income. Disclosure flags shift toward a more explicit total-return framework alongside the same-day buyback.
summary_jp: 年間配当を¥40から¥50へ25%増配、配当性向は約31%に上昇。総還元方針への一歩。

summary_en: Cancellation of 1,800,000 treasury shares (3.7% of S/O) effective 2026-01-31, retiring stock acquired under the FY25 buyback programme. Reduces total shares outstanding and supports per-share metrics.
summary_jp: 自己株式180万株（発行済の3.7%）を2026年1月31日付で消却。
